feed.title: SAP Community - Situation Handling
feed.subtitle: Situation Handling Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Situation template PROC_CONTRACTCONSUMPTNPREDICTION is not triggering the situation instance
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are trying to enable the situation handling for the contract expiry through situation template PROC_CONTRACTCONSUMPTNPREDICTION. We have done the notification configuration and test notification is triggering to fiori. We have created a situation type via manage situation type app and It is triggering and i am able to see the logs in SLG1. As per the logs it is checking the data in table I_PURCONTRITMCNSMPNPREDICTION. But this table is updating from the ISLM Model QTY_CONTRACT_CNSMPN and which is not active in our system. Can any one suggest whether I am in right path or I missed something. Please suggest to move ahead as well.

Regards,

Prabhu V

entry.title: Situation Handling in Manufacturing and Quality Management
entry.content:
Hello Guru ,

I need to simulate the workflow like Process in Production order for order approval.

Kindly guide me how this can achived ?

What are objects/Events are available for Manufacturing and QM in situtation Handling ?

entry.title: Manage Situation Types for EWM inventory document on S/4H Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have a question about how to manage situations while processing physical inventory in SAP EWM Cloud Public Edition.

The objective here is to send a notification to the user when an inventory document is created and counted so he can confirm the counted quantities. It works very fine when using IM storage location (scope item BML). In the scope item BML, the system suggests to use situation type "ZMAN_PHYSICAL_INVENTORY_MONITOR" (tile : Manage Situation Types) where we can write the message to send when for example the inventory document is counted (we can define other criteria). We can run a background job or trigger it manually to send the notification.

Now for the scope item 3BX, where we use inventory document for EWM storage location. The situation type doesn't send any message or notification even if we put the EWM storage location in customized criteria in situation type.

Anyone has already seen this issue or can suggest me how to send a notification after a certain situation (in inventory process) in EWM on a S/4H Cloud Public Edition System ?

Thanks,

Anas.

entry.title: Situation Handling Type PROC_PURCHASEREQUISITION not triggering notification
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have a scenario where the procurement team needs to receive a Fiori app notification after a Purchase Requisition (PR) is approved or rejected. To achieve this, I tried configuring an event-based situation using the Situation type PROC_PURCHASEREQUISITION and set the condition as "Release Status" = "Approved" or "Rejected". I also tried using PROCESSING STATUS = "X". However, even after creating and approving the purchase requisition, the situation was triggered but the notification was not sent to the team (list of users).

Upon checking the Situation Log, I noticed the message "No Instances detected".

Attached log for your reference.

Thanks,

Vijay

log-details.txtlog-details-1.txt

entry.title: Additional MRP Exceptions for Situation Handling?
entry.content:
Dear all,

My client currently has situation handling set up for MRP exceptions (Cancel Process in particular) as MRP exception monitoring is important to the production processes.

Three MRP exceptions need to be monitored on a daily basis for all procured materials:

- Cancel Process

- Reschedule in

- Reschedule out

Situation handling for MRP exceptions does not include the 'Reschedule in' and 'Reschedule out' exceptions.

Will future versions of SAP allow to create situation types for the 'Reschedule in' and 'Reschedule out' exceptions?

If not, will the 'Detect MRP Situations' tile ever be able to detect the 'Reschedule in' and 'Reschedule out' exceptions?

If both answers negative, are the 'Reschedule in' and 'Reschedule out' exceptions still part of the target architecture?

If so, what would be the correct way to monitor 'Reschedule in' and 'Reschedule out' exceptions for all procured materials?

Regards,

Ariel

entry.title: How to add team category to Situation Template?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am trying to set a Situation Handling functionality into our client´s SAP (private cloud) but I can not assign any Team Category to the new Situation Type. In some templates delivered by SAP is it working and it loads team category automatically, but in many others copied templates it does not. Any ideas how to solve that? Could be the problem that some of them (templates/teams categories/....) are not activated yet?

Thanks a lot for you advices

Matus

entry.title: Comparison between SAP Event Driven Architecture and SAP Feature - Situation Handling
entry.content: Both SAP's event driven ecosystem and the feature Situation Handling share the common goal of enhancing real-time responsiveness and facilitating better decision-making through notification of events. How are both different in terms of scope, benefits, applicability, and integration within the SAP environment? Can you share scenarios where EDA is more suitable or exclusive, making Situation Handling unnecessary?

entry.title: Extended Situation Handling in S4Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi all,

I created several extended situations in my S/4Hana Public Cloud system, but some situations return an error upon triggering: "Entity=references_to_objects_not_allowed". The error seems to suggest that some business objects of SAP cannot be used for extended situation handling or am I perhaps wrong?

The SAP object type on which I created this extended situation handling is Journal Entry and the event should be triggered with event CL_FINS_JOURNALENTRY_SOT_EVENT.

Is there also some trouble shooting documentation about the triggers of situation handling?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Triggering credit limit request notification via situation type
entry.content:
I am implementing credit limit request notification via situation type.

In terms of approver group in the credit limit request, it is determined properly. The situation type I’m using is copied from situation template FIN_CLR_APPROVAL which in turn uses responsibility rule FIN_CLR_APPROVER for agent determination.

So far no notification has been triggered when the credit limit request is put into status “In Approval”.

Can anyone suggest a possible reason for this behaviour?

entry.title: Exploring Notification Options in S/4 HANA Public Cloud for Centralized User Communications
entry.content:
I'm reaching out to gather insights regarding an initiative we're undertaking for a client. They are eager to implement a centralized system for disseminating important information to their end users, such as process changes, updates, and downtime notifications.

Our initial thought was to leverage the notification service within the Launchpad for this purpose. However, it appears that the options for sending custom notifications in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition might be limited

With this in mind, I've been exploring alternative solutions and came across the possibility of using Situation Handling as a potential workaround for posting notifications. My understanding is somewhat limited, and I've noticed a lack of comprehensive documentation on integrating situation handling with custom business objects

I would greatly appreciate any advice, experiences, or insights you could share on this matter. Specifically, is it feasible to create a situation object linked to a custom business object for this purpose? Or are there other strategies within the S/4 HANA ecosystem that you would recommend for achieving centralized communication with end users?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Situation Handling: Confirmation is Overdue for PR Item
entry.content:
Confirmation is Overdue for PR Item". 

For the situation type there is no rule available in the template. When we click on Add new the search results are empty. How do we add a rule in the recipient section?

PROCDOC_OVERDUEPRITEM

entry.title: Message =Data loss occurred when converting 20244900000941
entry.content:
I am Trying to create a custom situation handling scenario where a notification will be triggered after every FG Goods movement, it will help the Logistic team to plan dispatch activities.

For this purpose I have created a custom situation object using Event Object "CL_MMIM_MATDOC_EVENT" i.e Material Document Created. And further created Situation Scenario and Type Accordingly. When I run the Situation type using batch trigger i get the appropriate notification

 

But when triggering an Event I get the following Error "Message =Data loss occurred when converting 20244900000941" it is unable to separate Document Year and Number.

Thanks & Regards

Ashish Talekar

Situation Handling SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition @Former Member @ana_goncalves

entry.title: How to create a Notification or a Situation when a Incoterms changed in SAP Sales Order
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am new to SAP Fiori (Situation Handling via SAP Fiori or Any other Standard way in SAP ) and tried from my end to create the below Situation but unable to do it. So request you to please answer /help to create below Situation.

Situation ---->  I would like to create a situation and Send a notification if Someone is Changed Incoterms in SAP Sales order ( if Sales org = XXXX ) and Notification alert to a Special team or Email ID.

Please help!!

Thanks

entry.title: Situation Handling Safety Stock
entry.content: Do anyone know if Stock Level is a part of the standard framework in the scope item Situation Handling? I would like notifications when my stock goes below a certain safety stock threshold. It could either be directly from the safety stock in Masterdata, or just set a constraint on a number of available unrestricted stock. Any help would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Situation Handling - "Budget Threshold Exceeded": How do I enable email notification?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I would like to use situation handling with Budget Threshold Exceeded in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.
Is it possible to enable email notifications? Currently only regular alerts (bell symbol) are working.

I want to send an email to the project manager. Is there anything I need to enable / configure first?

(I can't see any emails being sent using the "Monitor Email Transmission" app. Other things like workflow emails etc. work fine).

Here are the current settings:

Thanks for your help.

Simon

entry.title: Custom Situation Handling Object: Creation Not Allowed via ADT
entry.content:
Hi All,

On S/4HANA Public Cloud: Has anyone successfully created a Custom Situation Object via ADT and completely integrated it to a scenario, to receive an alert based on a situation?

I had written to SAP in Dec 2022 & in Jun 2023 via OSS messages to understand how can that be done and at both times, I received message back saying all the components required to make this work is not yet released.

Now, even after 2048 upgrade (and 18 months after my last OSS message to SAP), still the Situation is no different. When I try to built a custom situation object via ADT, I still do not have authorization to do that (eventhough I have complete development access to the tenant)

The interfaces required to have an event based trigger is not yet released. Interfaces required for defining callback classes are also not released. Thus, custom classes cannot be defined for any of the actions or triggers.

The only way I have managed to create a custom situation object is via Key User Extensibility, referencing a custom CDS view.

SAP had published the tutorial and examples for creation of custom situation object via ADT, long time ago (https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-development-tools-user-guide/creating-situation-objects?version=s4hana_cloud) and messages like this, this & this from SAP employees, seem to indicate that whatever is required to build the solution is all delivered by SAP.

So, what am I missing here? Has SAP delivered this functionality at all for S/4HANA on Cloud (or ABAP on Cloud) as per their training/documentation?

If yes, what is still needed in developer roles to avoid the error? If no, when is this functionality expected to be fully released?

Cc: @ana_goncalves @angelika_salmen 

Thanks

entry.title: Manage Situation Types - Extended - Create button not visible in SAP Public Cloud Starter System
entry.content:
I am trying to set up new situations through the app Manage Situation Types - Extended, but the Create button is not available. It should be there, according to the 31N test script, but it is not. I should have on my account all the necessary business catalogs and the process has been activated in scoping.

Does anyone know what needs to be done to enable this?

Many thanks

entry.title: SItuation Scenarios
entry.content: When I create a purchase order scenario in Situation scenarios when I try to create a purchase order actually i am getting a notification, but I am not getting any notification what I need to get the notification, please help on this

entry.title: S4HANA Situation type PROC_ABOUT_TO_EXPIRE_CTR not found
entry.content:
Hi Expert:

in Manage Situation Types app

I cannot find PROC_ABOUT_TO_EXPIRE_CTR tempate there.

Pls advise.

entry.title: S4HANA Manage Situation object, Manage Situation - extended not found
entry.content:
Hi Expert:

really cannot find this 3 apps 

  1. Manage Situation Object
  2. Manage Situation Scenarios
  3. Manage Situation - extended

pls advise
